title: Capt. Ghruom
bodyText:
Dwarven fighter, Root loyalist, one of three leaders scrapping for the Stonemasons' guild in the vacuum (with clerics **Gilly** and **Drumnar**). Led the march on town with Gilly (S23) — talked down, not fought. **Has vowed to find Root's killer.** Portrait: art/ghruom.jpg

# Threads
[[thread-ghruoms-vendetta]]
